headline: Apple price hikes hit MacBooks and iPads on memory crunch
detail: Apple is raising prices on MacBooks and iPads due to tightening memory supply. This signals chip/memory demand stress that directly pressures sentiment across your semiconductor names — AVGO, SMH, and CRWD's hardware ecosystem all feel this. It's a headwind, not a tailwind, for your heaviest sector exposure.

headline: Micron surges 10% on earnings, then pulls back from highs
detail: Micron's blowout quarter confirms strong chip demand, but the fade from highs is a warning — good news is already priced in and sellers are ready. This pattern matters for AVGO and SMH: strong fundamentals don't guarantee price strength when sentiment gets shaky. Watch how MU closes; it's a real-time read on your sector.

headline: SpaceX stock called a 'terrible buy' — what it means for the bull market
detail: A bearish public take on SpaceX hits right as you hold both SPCX (new IPO) and SPAL (2x leveraged ETF). Negative narrative early in an IPO's life can crush price discovery fast. With SPAL already down 16% and decaying daily, this headline adds reputational risk on top of structural decay risk.
